verify_integrity\nverify_integrity(\"mnemosyne.db\")\nrestore_backup(\"mnemosyne-backup.db\", \"mnemosyne.db\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Missing
